markdown:
#  Delete Drawing Markups 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * _To delete published markups_ , 'Admin' level permissions on the Drawings tool.  
_Note:_ Admins can enable a setting to allow users with 'Standard' permissions to delete published markups. See [Allow Users To Delete Published Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups).
    * _To delete personal markups_ , 'Read Only' or higher level permissions on the Drawings tool.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to your project's **Drawings** tool.
  2. Click Drawing number next to the drawing you want to mark up.
  3. Click the Markup ![Markup In The Drawing Toolbar](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/690eed7f1b889b05c32e8c1fa29218f8/97849b368c8d5070d7b9f4577cc64966/markup-in-the-drawing-toolbar.jpg?fm=webp&h=41)icon. 


_Note:_ You can also click **Info** in the drawing log next to the drawing, then click **Open in Viewer / Markup**.
4. Click the **Select,** **Multi Select** , or **Lasso** from the markup toolbar.
5. Select the markup(s) that you want to delete.
_Note:_ See above user permissions for which users can delete objects from each layer. See [What is the difference between published and personal markups?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-the-difference-between-personal-and-published-drawing-markups)
6. Click the delete ![Icon Delete Trash6](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/1dbb3da647413c8d26d99a2503cae34a/e42448ea8213372016febd013f8b7532/trash-icon.png?fm=webp&h=15) icon to delete the markup(s).
Note: To delete individual photos from a photo markup, click the photo and then click the delete icon in the photo view page.
## See Also
  * [Drawings - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/permissions)
  * [Allow Users To Delete Published Markups](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/allow-users-to-delete-published-markups)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Drawings](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/drawings-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-drawings)
title: Delete Drawing Markups
description: How to remove public or personal markups from a drawing.
